calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Judge Pro Tem: James Green Department 504B Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Crt.Rpt.: Susan K. Crozier

Tom Wright, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff
Defendant Iris Hall appearing Pro Per

Cause came on calendar for unlawful detainer settlement conference.

Case settles on the record. Plaintiff Vincent Kircher have and recover judgment against defendant Iris Hall as follows:
1. Restitution and possession of the premises known as 1008 Larkin St. #107B
2. Forfeiture of the rental agreement
3. 100.00 principal
3. Each side to bear own costs and fees
5. Eviction stayed until 12/02/03. If the defendant does pay the amount of $100.00 by noon 11/10/03 the stay is forfeited and writ will be issued for immediate possession.
Terms reduced to writing.
